message:
fix(policy): constructor sets correct pre_fallback_mode and fallback_reason for kill_switch

PolicyEngine::new() with kill_switch=true was setting pre_fallback_mode to
FallbackSafe (the active mode) instead of the intended initial_mode. This made
recovery from kill_switch impossible — recover_from_fallback() would restore to
FallbackSafe again. Also sets fallback_reason to KillSwitch so update_config()
can correctly identify kill_switch-caused fallbacks for recovery.

Also includes review-discovered fixes: RepeatDeletionTracker live config reload
via update_cooldowns(), checked_sub for cooldown arithmetic, is_multiple_of
cleanup, and deletion report path tracking test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
